reuse_findings.notes: iot_devices is not in baseline; it is proposed by E-045 (which is in this unit's depends_on). Reuse is verified pending E-045 schema approval.

notes: Unit is a pure classifier with one GET endpoint and no DB writes. Only depends on iot_devices.last_seen / device_status — both proposed in E-045.
schema_ts_line in YAML is set to 1 as a placeholder (correct, since iot_devices does not yet exist in schema.ts). The ±5-line reuse rule does not apply for tables introduced by depended-on units.
BRD sync audit shows no gap touching this classifier; freshness/last_seen semantics are documented in 6.2.5 and consumed by 6.2.7 (E-050).
